steps.title: Compare with the choices
steps.content:
• A) $15x+10$: forgot to multiply $10$ by $15$. Eliminated.
  • B) $15x+150$: matches the distributed expression.
  • C) $15x+25$: added $15+10$ instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • D) $15x+5$: subtracted instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
